_description: WT-06 heuristic fixture: a Tauri project (statefulRuntime='tauri'). Tauri's WebView ↔ Rust bridge holds runtime state (windows, FS handles, IPC channels) that does NOT survive being driven from a sibling worktree. Even when file-touches are disjoint and no port is bound right now, the framework category alone is sufficient to mark this anti-fit. Heuristic should emit verdict=anti-fit-warn. The 2026-04-26 SessionHelm/WinLocksmith Tauri-port-collision incident is the trigger lineage.

antiFitReasons: multiple shared build-artifact dirs present: node_modules, target

expectedSurfaceText: Note: project-runtime-state reports antiFitScore=3 (stateful runtime detected: tauri; file watcher config(s) present: vite.config.ts; multiple shared build-artifact dirs present: node_modules, target). Same-branch is the right choice for this project — proceeding.
